name: Covet
shortDescEn: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
descEn: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Mail or Z-Crystal, or if the target is a Kyogre holding a Blue Orb, a Groudon holding a Red Orb, a Giratina holding a Griseous Orb, an Arceus holding a Plate, a Genesect holding a Drive, a Silvally holding a Memory, or a Pokemon that can Mega Evolve holding the Mega Stone for its species. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
shortDescJa: 持ち物がない時、相手の持ち物を奪う。
descJa: 自分が道具を持っていない場合、攻撃が成功すると相手の持っている道具を奪う。

name: Crabhammer
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio.
descEn: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

name: Cross Chop
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio.
descEn: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

name: Cross Poison
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio. 10% chance to poison.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to poison the target and a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすく10%で毒にする。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「どく」状態にし、急所に当たりやすい。

name: Crunch
shortDescEn: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
descEn: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 20%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
descJa: 20%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Crush Claw
shortDescEn: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
descEn: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 50%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
descJa: 50%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Curse
shortDescEn: Curses if Ghost, else -1 Spe, +1 Atk, +1 Def.
descEn: If the user is not a Ghost type, lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage and raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage. If the user is a Ghost type, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down and even if it would cause fainting, in exchange for the target losing 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn while it is active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue to be affected. Fails if there is no target or if the target is already affected.
shortDescJa: ゴーストはHPを削り呪う。他は素早さ-1、攻撃・防御+1。
descJa: 自分がゴーストタイプなら最大HPの1/2を削り、相手を呪い状態にする。それ以外なら自分の素早さランクを1段階下げ、攻撃・防御ランクを1段階ずつ上げる。

name: Darkest Lariat
shortDescEn: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
descEn: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.
shortDescJa: 相手の能力変化を無視。
descJa: 相手の能力ランク変化を無視してダメージを与える。

name: Dark Pulse
shortDescEn: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
descEn: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
shortDescJa: 20%で相手をひるませる。
descJa: 20%の確率で相手をひるませる。

name: Dazzling Gleam
shortDescEn: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。周囲の相手全員を攻撃する。

name: Decorate
shortDescEn: Raises the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 2.
descEn: Raises the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃と特攻を2段階上げる。
descJa: 対象の攻撃ランクと特攻ランクを2段階ずつ上げる。

name: Defog
shortDescEn: -1 evasion; ends user and target hazards/terrain.
descEn: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 1 stage. If this move is successful and whether or not the target's evasiveness was affected, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, Mist, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the target's side, and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Sticky Web end for the user's side. Ignores a target's substitute, although a substitute will still block the lowering of evasiveness. If there is a terrain active and this move is successful, the terrain will be cleared.
shortDescJa: 回避率を下げ、壁・場・地形の効果を消す。
descJa: 相手の回避率を1段階下げ、両方の場の壁・場・地形の効果を解除する。

name: Destiny Bond
shortDescEn: If an opponent knocks out the user, it also faints.
descEn: Until the user's next move, if an opposing Pokemon's attack knocks the user out, that Pokemon faints as well, unless the attack was Doom Desire or Future Sight. Fails if the user used this move successfully as its last move, disregarding moves used through the Dancer Ability.
shortDescJa: 倒されると相手も道連れにする。
descJa: この技を使った後、相手の攻撃で倒されると相手も道連れにする。

name: Detect
shortDescEn: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
descEn: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
shortDescJa: 攻撃をかわす。
descJa: このターンの相手の技をすべて無効にする。連続で使うと失敗しやすい。

name: Dig
shortDescEn: Digs underground turn 1, strikes turn 2.
descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Earthquake and Magnitude but takes double damage from them, and is also unaffected by weather. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
shortDescJa: 1ターン目に潜り、2ターン目に攻撃。
descJa: 1ターン目に地中に潜り、2ターン目に攻撃する。

name: Dire Claw
shortDescEn: 30% chance to sleep, poison, or paralyze target.
descEn: Has a 30% chance to cause the target to either fall asleep, become poisoned, or become paralyzed.
shortDescJa: 30%で眠り・毒・麻痺のいずれかにする。
descJa: 30%の確率で、相手を「ねむり」「どく」「まひ」のいずれかの状態にする。

name: Disable
shortDescEn: For 4 turns, disables the target's last move used.
descEn: For 4 turns, the target's last move used becomes disabled. Fails if one of the target's moves is already disabled, if the target has not made a move, if the target no longer knows the move, or if the move was a Max or G-Max Move.
shortDescJa: 4ターンの間、相手の最後に出した技を封じる。
descJa: 4ターンの間、対象が最後に使った技を封印して使えなくする。

name: Discharge
shortDescEn: 30% chance to paralyze adjacent Pokemon.
descEn: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.
shortDescJa: 30%で相手を麻痺させる。
descJa: 30%の確率で相手を「まひ」状態にする。

name: Dive
shortDescEn: Dives underwater turn 1, strikes turn 2.
descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Surf and Whirlpool but takes double damage from them, and is also unaffected by weather. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
shortDescJa: 1ターン目に潜り、2ターン目に攻撃。
descJa: 1ターン目に水中に潜り、2ターン目に攻撃する。

name: Double-Edge
shortDescEn: Has 33% recoil.
descEn: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの33%の反動。
descJa: 与えたダメージの約33%の反動ダメージを自分が受ける。

name: Double Hit
shortDescEn: Hits 2 times in one turn.
descEn: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.
shortDescJa: 2回連続攻撃。
descJa: 2回連続で攻撃する。

name: Double Team
shortDescEn: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1.
descEn: Raises the user's evasiveness by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 自分の回避率を1段階上げる。
descJa: 自分の回避率ランクを1段階上げる。

name: Draco Meteor
shortDescEn: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
descEn: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 自分の特攻を2段階下げる。
descJa: 自分の特攻ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Dragon Cheer
shortDescEn: Ally: Crit ratio +1, or +2 if ally is Dragon type.
descEn: Raises the target's chance for a critical hit by 1 stage, or by 2 stages if the target is Dragon type. Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user, or if the target already has this effect or the Focus Energy effect. Baton Pass can be used to transfer this effect to an ally.
shortDescJa: 味方の急所率を上げる。ドラゴンなら2段階。
descJa: 味方の急所ランクを1段階上げる。味方がドラゴンタイプなら2段階上げる。

name: Dragon Claw
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Dragon Dance
shortDescEn: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1.
descEn: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 自分の攻撃と素早さを1段階上げる。
descJa: 自分の攻撃ランクと素早さランクを1段階ずつ上げる。

name: Dragon Darts
shortDescEn: Hits twice. Doubles: Tries to hit each foe once.
descEn: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit. In Double Battles, this move attempts to hit the targeted Pokemon and its ally once each. If hitting one of these Pokemon would be prevented by immunity, protection, semi-invulnerability, an Ability, or accuracy, it attempts to hit the other Pokemon twice instead. If this move is redirected, it hits that target twice.
shortDescJa: 2回連続攻撃。ダブルでは相手2体を1回ずつ。
descJa: 2回連続で攻撃する。ダブルバトルでは、相手のポケモン2体をそれぞれ1回ずつ攻撃する。

name: Dragon Pulse
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Dragon Rush
shortDescEn: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
descEn: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
shortDescJa: 20%で相手をひるませる。
descJa: 20%の確率で相手をひるませる。相手が「ちいさくなる」状態だと必中しダメージが2倍になる。

name: Dragon Tail
shortDescEn: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
descEn: If both the user and the target have not fainted, the target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. This effect fails if the target used Ingrain previously, has the Suction Cups Ability, or this move hit a substitute.
shortDescJa: 相手を強制交代させる。
descJa: 相手を強制的に交代させる。

name: Draining Kiss
shortDescEn: User recovers 75% of the damage dealt.
descEn: The user recovers 3/4 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの75%を回復。
descJa: 与えたダメージの3/4のHPを回復する。

name: Drain Punch
shortDescEn: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
descEn: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
shortDescJa: 与えたダメージの50%を回復。
descJa: 与えたダメージの半分のHPを回復する。

name: Drill Peck
shortDescEn: No additional effect.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 追加効果なし。
descJa: 特に追加効果なし。

name: Drill Run
shortDescEn: High critical hit ratio.
descEn: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
shortDescJa: 急所に当たりやすい。
descJa: 急所に当たりやすい。

name: Dual Wingbeat
shortDescEn: Hits 2 times in one turn.
descEn: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.
shortDescJa: 2回連続攻撃。
descJa: 2回連続で攻撃する。

name: Dynamic Punch
shortDescEn: 100% chance to confuse the target.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手を混乱させる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手を混乱状態にする。

name: Earth Power
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Earthquake
shortDescEn: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dig.
descEn: Damage doubles if the target is using Dig.
shortDescJa: 周囲のポケモンを攻撃。潜っている相手には2倍。
descJa: 周囲のポケモン全員を攻撃する。地中に潜っている相手にはダメージが2倍になる。

name: Eerie Impulse
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Sp. Atk by 2.
descEn: Lowers the target's Special Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 相手の特攻を2段階下げる。
descJa: 相手の特攻ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Eerie Spell
shortDescEn: Removes 3 PP from the target's last move.
descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the target loses 3 PP from its last move.
shortDescJa: 相手の最後に出した技のPPを3減らす。
descJa: 相手が最後に使った技のPPを3減らす。

name: Electric Terrain
shortDescEn: 5 turns. Grounded: +Electric power, can't sleep.
descEn: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Electric Terrain. During the effect, the power of Electric-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot fall asleep; Pokemon already asleep do not wake up. Grounded Pokemon cannot become affected by Yawn or fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into an Electric type, Nature Power becomes Thunderbolt, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause paralysis. Fails if the current terrain is Electric Terrain.
shortDescJa: 5ターンの間、電気を帯びる。眠らず電気技強化。
descJa: 5ターンの間、足がついているポケモンは眠らなくなり、電気タイプの技の威力が1.3倍になる。

name: Electrify
shortDescEn: Changes the target's move to Electric this turn.
descEn: Causes the target's move to become Electric type this turn. Among effects that can change a move's type, this effect happens last. Fails if the target already moved this turn.
shortDescJa: 相手の技を電気タイプに変える。
descJa: 対象のそのターンの技を電気タイプに変える。

name: Electro Ball
shortDescEn: More power the faster the user is than the target.
descEn: The power of this move depends on (user's current Speed / target's current Speed), rounded down. Power is equal to 150 if the result is 4 or more, 120 if 3, 80 if 2, 60 if 1, 40 if less than 1. If the target's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 40.
shortDescJa: 自分の方が素早いほど威力が上がる。
descJa: 自分の方が素早さが高いほど威力が上がる（最大威力150）。

name: Electro Shot
shortDescEn: Raises Sp. Atk by 1, hits turn 2. Rain: no charge.
descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, the move still requires a turn to charge.
shortDescJa: 特攻を上げ、次ターン攻撃。雨時は即時攻撃。
descJa: 1ターン目に特攻ランクを1段階上げ、2ターン目に攻撃する。雨の時はチャージなしで攻撃できる。

name: Electroweb
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の素早さを1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の素早さランクを1段階下げる。

name: Encore
shortDescEn: Target repeats its last move for its next 3 turns.
descEn: For its next 3 turns, the target is forced to repeat its last move used. If the affected move runs out of PP, the effect ends. Fails if the target is already under this effect, if it has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if the move is Assist, Blazing Torque, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Encore, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Transform, or Wicked Torque.
shortDescJa: 3ターンの間、相手の技を繰り返させる。
descJa: 3ターンの間、相手が最後に使った技しか出せなくなる。

name: Endeavor
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's HP to the user's HP.
descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to (target's current HP - user's current HP). The target is unaffected if its current HP is less than or equal to the user's current HP.
shortDescJa: 自分のHPと同じになるよう相手のHPを削る。
descJa: 相手のHPを自分と同じになるまで減らす。

name: Endure
shortDescEn: User survives attacks this turn with at least 1 HP.
descEn: The user will survive attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn with at least 1 HP. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
shortDescJa: 必ずHP1残して耐える。
descJa: そのターンの攻撃を必ずHP1だけ残して耐える。連続で使うと失敗しやすい。

name: Energy Ball
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Entrainment
shortDescEn: The target's Ability changes to match the user's.
descEn: Causes the target's Ability to become the same as the user's. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, or the same Ability as the user, or if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
shortDescJa: 相手の特性を自分と同じにする。
descJa: 対象の特性を自分と同じにする。

name: Eruption
shortDescEn: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
descEn: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.
shortDescJa: 自分のHPが減るほど威力が下がる。
descJa: 自分の残りHPが多いほど威力が上がる（最大威力150）。

name: Expanding Force
shortDescEn: User on Psychic Terrain: 1.5x power, hits foes.
descEn: If the current terrain is Psychic Terrain and the user is grounded, this move hits all opposing Pokemon and has its power multiplied by 1.5.
shortDescJa: サイコフィールド時は1.5倍、全体攻撃に。
descJa: サイコフィールド時、威力1.5倍で相手全体を攻撃する。

name: Explosion
shortDescEn: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
descEn: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
shortDescJa: 使用後、自分は倒れる。
descJa: 使用後、自分はひんし状態になる。

name: Extrasensory
shortDescEn: 10% chance to make the target flinch.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手をひるませる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手をひるませる。

name: Extreme Speed
shortDescEn: Nearly always goes first.
descEn: No additional effect.
shortDescJa: 先制攻撃を行う。
descJa: 優先度+2の先制技。追加効果なし。

name: Facade
shortDescEn: Power doubles if user is burn/poison/paralyzed.
descEn: Power doubles if the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned. The physical damage halving effect from the user's burn is ignored.
shortDescJa: 状態異常の時威力2倍。
descJa: 自分が「やけど」「まひ」「どく」状態の時、威力が2倍になる。

name: Fairy Lock
shortDescEn: Prevents all Pokemon from switching next turn.
descEn: Prevents all active Pokemon from switching next turn. A Pokemon can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. Fails if the effect is already active.
shortDescJa: 次のターン、全員交代できなくなる。
descJa: 次のターンの間、すべてのポケモンが交代できなくなる。

name: Fake Out
shortDescEn: Hits first. First turn out only. 100% flinch chance.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails unless it is the user's first turn on the field.
shortDescJa: 先制技。場に出て最初のターンのみ使用可能。
descJa: 優先度+3の先制技。場に出て最初のターンのみ成功し、100%の確率でひるませる。

name: Fake Tears
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
descEn: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 相手の特防を2段階下げる。
descJa: 相手の特防ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Feather Dance
shortDescEn: Lowers the target's Attack by 2.
descEn: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.
shortDescJa: 相手の攻撃を2段階下げる。
descJa: 相手の攻撃ランクを2段階下げる。

name: Feint
shortDescEn: Nullifies Detect, Protect, and Quick/Wide Guard.
descEn: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally.
shortDescJa: 守りを解除する。
descJa: 相手の「まもる」などの守り状態を解除する。

name: Fell Stinger
shortDescEn: Raises user's Attack by 3 if this KOes the target.
descEn: Raises the user's Attack by 3 stages if this move knocks out the target.
shortDescJa: 倒すと自分の攻撃が3段階上がる。
descJa: この技で相手をひんし状態にすると、自分の攻撃ランクが3段階上がる。

name: Fickle Beam
shortDescEn: Has a 30% chance this move's power is doubled.
descEn: Has a 30% chance this move's power is doubled.
shortDescJa: 30%の確率で威力が2倍になる。
descJa: 30%の確率で、この技の威力が2倍になる。

name: Fiery Dance
shortDescEn: 50% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
descEn: Has a 50% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 50%で自分の特攻が1段階上がる。
descJa: 50%の確率で自分の特攻ランクが1段階上がる。

name: Final Gambit
shortDescEn: Does damage equal to the user's HP. User faints.
descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's current HP. If this move is successful, the user faints.
shortDescJa: HP分だけダメージを与え、自身は倒れる。
descJa: 自分の残りHPと同等のダメージを相手に与え、自分はひんし状態になる。

name: Fire Blast
shortDescEn: 10% chance to burn the target.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手を火傷にする。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にする。

name: Fire Fang
shortDescEn: 10% chance to burn. 10% chance to flinch.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.
shortDescJa: 10%で火傷、10%でひるませる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にし、10%の確率でひるませる。

name: Fire Lash
shortDescEn: 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で相手の防御を1段階下げる。
descJa: 100%の確率で相手の防御ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Fire Punch
shortDescEn: 10% chance to burn the target.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手を火傷にする。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にする。

name: Fire Spin
shortDescEn: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
descEn: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
shortDescJa: 4〜5ターン拘束してダメージ。
descJa: 4〜5ターンの間、相手を逃げられなくし、毎ターン終了時に最大HPの1/8のダメージを与える。

name: First Impression
shortDescEn: Nearly always goes first. First turn out only.
descEn: Fails unless it is the user's first turn on the field.
shortDescJa: 先制攻撃。場に出て最初のターンのみ使用可能。
descJa: 優先度+2の先制技。場に出て最初のターンのみ成功する。

name: Fissure
shortDescEn: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
descEn: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
shortDescJa: 一撃必殺。レベルが低いと失敗。
descJa: 一撃必殺技。相手をひんし状態にする。自分のレベルが相手より低いと失敗する。

name: Flail
shortDescEn: More power the less HP the user has left.
descEn: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.
shortDescJa: 自分のHPが少ないほど威力が上がる。
descJa: 自分の残りHPが少ないほど威力が上がる（最大威力200）。

name: Flame Charge
shortDescEn: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
descEn: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 100%で自分の素早さが1段階上がる。
descJa: 100%の確率で自分の素早さランクが1段階上がる。

name: Flamethrower
shortDescEn: 10% chance to burn the target.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手を火傷にする。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にする。

name: Flare Blitz
shortDescEn: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to burn. Thaws user.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to burn the target. If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
shortDescJa: 33%の反動、10%で火傷、自身の凍結解除。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手を「やけど」状態にする。与えたダメージの約33%の反動ダメージを受け、自分が凍っている場合は氷が溶ける。

name: Flash Cannon
shortDescEn: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
descEn: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
shortDescJa: 10%で相手の特防を1段階下げる。
descJa: 10%の確率で相手の特防ランクを1段階下げる。

name: Flatter
shortDescEn: Raises the target's Sp. Atk by 1 and confuses it.
descEn: Raises the target's Special Attack by 1 stage and confuses it.
shortDescJa: 相手の特攻を1段階上げ、混乱させる。
descJa: 相手の特攻ランクを1段階上げ、相手を混乱状態にする。

name: Fling
shortDescEn: Flings the user's item at the target. Power varies.
descEn: The power of this move is based on the user's held item. The held item is lost and it activates for the target if applicable. If there is no target or the target avoids this move by protecting itself, the user's held item is still lost. The user can regain a thrown item with Recycle or the Harvest Ability. Fails if the user has no held item, if the held item cannot be thrown, if the user is under the effect of Embargo or Magic Room, or if the user has the Klutz Ability.
shortDescJa: 持ち物を投げつける。威力は持ち物依存。
descJa: 持っている道具を投げつけて攻撃する。道具によって威力が異なり、投げた道具はなくなる。

name: Flip Turn
shortDescEn: User switches out after damaging the target.
descEn: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.
shortDescJa: 攻撃後、控えと交代する。
descJa: 攻撃後、控えのポケモンと交代する。

name: Flower Trick
shortDescEn: Always results in a critical hit; no accuracy check.
descEn: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities. This move does not check accuracy.
shortDescJa: 必ず急所に当たり、必中。
descJa: 必ず急所に当たり、かつ必ず命中する。

name: Fly
shortDescEn: Flies up on first turn, then strikes the next turn.
descEn: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks other than Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, Thunder, and Twister, and Gust and Twister have doubled power when used against it. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
shortDescJa: 1ターン目に空へ飛び、2ターン目に攻撃。
descJa: 1ターン目に空へ飛び、2ターン目に攻撃する。

name: Flying Press
shortDescEn: Combines Flying in its type effectiveness.
descEn: This move combines Flying in its type effectiveness against the target. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
shortDescJa: ひこうタイプも加えた相性で攻撃。
descJa: ひこうタイプの相性も加えて攻撃する。相手が「ちいさくなる」状態だと必中しダメージが2倍になる。
